_comment: Hand-curated deep-history musical runs — important productions that ended BEFORE the archive started auto-accumulating (ticketing APIs don't expose past dates, so these are researched from Wikipedia/Wikidata/official records). Same schema as the auto archive; provenance is forced to 'curated' and these facts are authoritative (never overwritten by a scrape). group/tag are re-derived from works.json at build, so you only record FACTS here. For open-ended legendary runs use the real opening date as start_date and the closing date (or null if still running) as end_date. Add the canonical English title so it auto-tags + dedups with the live data.
